texto: You are unique. You are the only one in all of God's creation with your set of fingerprints--and your set of pain and experiences. You are special, and you are rare. The way the people in your life have treated you is absolutely no reflection of your value. It is only a reflection of their own pain and misery.Remember, it doesn't matter where you've been--only where you're going. Because life isn't what you get--it's what you give!!
explicacao: Citação de Darlene Ballard sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “You are unique. You are the only one in all of God's creation with your set of fingerprints--and …” articula reflexao, inspirational-life, reflection em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
